determinism_em155.flag_off_evidence: Full backend suite + frontend oracle (cityLayout.test.ts 91/91) pass UNCHANGED; no golden/snapshot/oracle regenerated. Per-file flag-off no-op tests in test_free_placement_{build_time,migration,position_field}.py + cityLayout.f1.test.ts.
determinism_em155.flag_on_evidence: test_free_placement_determinism.py: replay round-trip preserves stored positions verbatim; fork+resume == continuous under the same subsequent input (deterministic uuid stream).
determinism_em155.teeth_evidence: canonical (created_tick,id) order is load-bearing (reversed tick => different positions); positions are seed-sensitive (seed 1337 != 9999). A regression in either would be caught.

adversarial_claims.claim: A — flag-off byte-identical to pre-F1 main
adversarial_claims.evidence: 1932 backend + 1213 frontend pass, oracle unchanged; position serialize-when-set (bool((0.0,0.0)) is True so origin positions are not dropped), from_snapshot absent=>None, migration guarded by any(position is None) + flag.

adversarial_claims.claim: B — flag-on placement deterministic + append-stable, no hash/float/uuid non-determinism
adversarial_claims.evidence: place_all sorts (created_tick,id) and iterates the id-ordered placed LIST only; every draw via _seeded_unit; append-only (new tick sorts last, never moves existing); stable across 50 repeated calls; empty/singleton/all-same-tick edges stable.

adversarial_claims.claim: C — derive-on-load == live-incremental (R3), never overwrites, destroyed stay parents
adversarial_claims.evidence: test_free_placement_migration.py (4 tests): R3 equivalence, no-overwrite, destroyed-as-fixed-parents, flag-off no-op.

code_review.notes: Diff faithful to plan+contract. World-frame end-to-end (zero conversions). One deviation reviewed and sound: CozyWorld threads position:b.position into lotInput (additive, inert while flag off, required so the wrapper sees positions when flipped on). One QE self-inflicted defect found+fixed during verify: the new determinism test leaked a global uuid patch (direct assignment) and polluted test_menagerie; rerouted through monkeypatch.

consumer_audit.notes: CozyWorld:541 was the sole assignBuildingLots caller (now resolveBuildingPositions). WorldMap.tsx draws one footprint per PLACE (place coords), never building.position. No further consumer wiring needed.

verify_workflow_note: The initial adversarial-verify workflow (wu8psas41) aborted mid-run on transient API/network errors (ECONNRESET / cert-verification) with all 5 agents dropped — NOT a code failure. This report was produced by the lead inline: authored+ran the determinism gate test, ran an adversarial edge-case probe, re-reviewed the diff, and ran the authoritative full suites.
standing_user_gate: Visual sign-off: flip both FREE_PLACEMENT_ENABLED flags (backend agents/runtime.py + frontend cityLayout.ts) and watch a real accreted city render (the ROAD_MESH_ENABLED-style gate). Not part of this build.
